---
title: "Session 3: Reproducibility, Continued"
subtitle: "Replication packages in practice (with Lars Vilhuber)"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Materials for this session are being prepared for the companion site.**
:::

## Where this session fits

The second reproducibility session continues with Lars Vilhuber. We move from principles to practice: building a replication package, handling data that cannot be posted, documenting computational environments.

Topics expected to be covered:

- The anatomy of a well-structured replication package.
- Restricted data: what to disclose, what to stub.
- Computational environment: `renv`, Docker, containers.
- Common reasons replication packages fail review.

## Materials

Slides and references will be linked here after the session.
